header_strip_anchor.reason: `hive.html` source chip declares fuel(s) ['v_logbook_truth', 'v_inventory_items_truth'] but renderer `loadSupervisorSummary()` does not reference them (directly or via a registered alt). The verdict and Plain-Read cards will silently ignore those fuels — same bug class as L9 but on the render side. Either roll the fuel into the renderer, drop it from the source chip, or register an alt in HEADER_STRIP_CONTRACT['alts'].
